summary: Plan-mode classification only. #89043 remains the live non-security canonical issue. #90329 is explicitly security-sensitive in the job and preflight artifact, so it is quarantined with route_security and no close, merge, or fix action is planned.

actions.reason: #89043 is the best hydrated, open, non-security canonical for the feature request family.

The job and hydrated live-state artifact explicitly classify #90329 as security-sensitive, so ProjectClownfish must route it to central OpenClaw security handling and avoid close, merge, label, comment, or fix actions for this item.
